since_last: 45% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.06%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC +1.58% · Gold -0.57% · Nasdaq100 +0.07%. 45% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.06%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.06%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +6.15%
cards.body: Leaders: META +6.15%, BABA +3.85%, HPE +3.44%, UEC +2.66%, TTD +2.23%. Laggards: RXRX -5.19%, INTC -2.86%, SYNA -2.68%, POWL -2.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.33% at $148.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
